title: margarospermum arvense
intro: Margarospermum arvense is a perennial herb native to Australia, commonly known as the "bitter pea". This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and skin problems, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Margarospermum arvense include soothing digestive issues, reducing inflammation, and promoting wound healing. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
